expectations.text: Test files use Java naming conventions
expectations.evidence: All test files use PascalCase + Test suffix: ExecutorTest.java, ContextTest.java, AclTest.java, RegistryTest.java. Methods use camelCase: shouldExecuteModuleWithValidInputs()

expectations.text: Example files use Java naming conventions
expectations.evidence: SimpleClient.java, GlobalClient.java, GreetModule.java, GetUserModule.java, SendEmailModule.java — all PascalCase
Tests use @Test annotation, import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test, Assertions.fail("Not implemented") for TDD red phase

expectations.text: Examples are complete runnable code with main methods
expectations.evidence: SimpleClient.java shows complete code: APCore client = new APCore(), client.register(), client.call(), Map result, System.out.println
